title: email-draft
description: Draft an email in the user's voice. Always runs humanizer before output.

subject.description: Email subject. Agent generates if omitted.

context.description: What this email is about -- include prior thread context if replying

account.description: Which email account to send from

action.description: 'draft' saves to Gmail drafts. 'send-after-approval' queues for user review.

reply_to_message_id.description: Gmail message ID if this is a reply to an existing thread

_anti_patterns: Run humanizer before any draft. Check all names/dates are correct.
Never send without user approval. 'draft' is the safe default.
Auto-fix NEVER touches user config. Alert instead of fixing.
